hooks.command: if echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | grep -q '"git commit"\|"git commit "'; then cd /Users/muhammadadnanrafiq/Documents/alis-reactive-framework-1-0/Alis.Reactive && npm test 2>&1 && dotnet test tests/Alis.Reactive.UnitTests 2>&1 && dotnet test tests/Alis.Reactive.PlaywrightTests 2>&1 || (echo 'BLOCKED: Tests must pass before committing. Fix failing tests first.' && exit 1); fi
